changes.before: Mile High Heating and Air, LLC

after: Active flooding that cannot be isolated or turned off
Raw sewage backing up into the house

after.action: Clara takes a message and has office manager Jenny call the customer back in the morning

changes.before: Uses ServiceTitan as CRM and dispatch system
changes.after: Clara has bi-directional access to the Housecall Pro account.

changes.before: Calls not answered after three rings are conditionally forwarded to Clara for handling; emergency situations are prioritized for immediate attention 24/7.
changes.after: After-hours starts at 4:30 PM and on weekends. Emergency calls trigger Clara to dial the Batphone; if voicemail is reached, Clara pulls the caller off hold and sends an urgent SMS to both the Batphone and the owner Mike. Non‑emergency after‑hours calls are taken as messages and the office manager Jenny will call the customer back in the morning. After‑hours emergency fee is $350; standard dispatch fee is $69, waived if the customer approves the work.
